about.title: Lawyer Harvey Specter
about.story.title: Specter & Associates Law Firm
about.story.content:
With over 15 years of experience as a lawyer, I specialize in effective and comprehensive legal services for individual and business clients. My goal is to provide clients with professional representation at every stage of the proceedings.

A graduate of the Faculty of Law at the University of Warsaw and a long-standing practitioner in civil, commercial, and labor law. Specter & Associates Law Firm uses modern IT systems ensuring efficient and electronic case handling.

Trust experience and integrity — I am your dedicated lawyer and trusted partner in all legal matters.
about.jurisdiction.title: Area of Practice
about.jurisdiction.content:
Specter & Associates Law Firm provides legal services throughout Poland, with a particular focus on Warsaw and the Warsaw metropolitan area. We represent clients before all levels of common courts, the Supreme Court, and administrative courts.

Our services cover both comprehensive legal support for businesses and legal assistance for individuals in civil, family, labor, and real estate matters.

The firm offers in-person consultations in Warsaw (ul. Marszałkowska 10, apt. 5) and remote online consultations, enabling us to serve clients from across Poland and abroad.

Court representation includes:

District and Regional Courts in Warsaw and surrounding areas, the Warsaw Court of Appeal, the Supreme Court, the Supreme Administrative Court and Regional Administrative Courts, and the Court of Arbitration at the Polish Chamber of Commerce.

The firm operates on the basis of registration on the list of attorneys maintained by the Warsaw Bar Association.
about.career.title: My Career
about.career.items.0.title: Lawyer, Managing Partner
about.career.items.0.description: As the founder and managing partner of Specter & Associates Law Firm, I provide professional legal services for individual clients and businesses. I specialize in civil, commercial, and real estate law, offering comprehensive case handling.
about.career.items.1.title: Lawyer
about.career.items.1.description: At the Warsaw law firm I gained comprehensive experience in court proceedings, commercial negotiations, and corporate legal services. The practical knowledge acquired became the foundation for independent practice.
about.career.items.2.title: Legal Trainee
about.career.items.2.description: I completed my legal traineeship under the supervision of experienced lawyers, gaining practical knowledge of civil, procedural, and commercial law. The traineeship concluded with a very good result on the bar examination.

faq.items.0.question: How do I schedule a first consultation?
faq.items.0.answer: The first consultation can be scheduled by phone, email, or via the contact form on our website. Consultations are available both in person in Warsaw and online — for clients from across Poland.
faq.items.1.question: What is the cost of legal advice?
faq.items.1.answer: The cost of legal advice depends on the complexity of the case and the time needed for analysis. Detailed terms are agreed individually before starting cooperation. The first consultation is free.
faq.items.2.question: What documents should I prepare for the first appointment?
faq.items.2.answer: For the first appointment, bring all documents related to your case (contracts, letters, judgments, notarial acts). The more information you provide, the more accurately we can assess your legal situation.
faq.items.3.question: Does the firm offer remote services?
faq.items.3.answer: Yes, the firm offers full remote services — online consultations, electronic document exchange, and power of attorney signing. We serve clients from across Poland and abroad.
faq.items.4.question: What types of cases can the firm help with?
faq.items.4.answer: The firm provides services in civil law, commercial law, labor law, real estate, family law, and debt recovery. Contact us to discuss your case.
